title: Resistivity Measurement Configuration for OmniDAC-Part 2
author: Lim, Jihnyuk
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These videos show the later steps for configuraing an OmniDAC (by Almax easylab) for resistivity measurements. The intial steps can be found at  10.5281/zenodo.11551828 .
